g.text: Follow the humming echo to the left.
Follow the dripping echo to the right.
Follow the whispering echo straight down...
Turn back before the water rises.
Follow the crystal's light back up.
Follow the chord toward the sound.
Climb down toward the chiming light.
Climb down the old rope ladder.
Scramble back up to be safe.
Walk up to the great bell.
Read the name and look behind the bell.
Take the lantern and rope and head out.
Climb down to the lake shore.
Crouch through toward the pale light.
Hurry back before the channel fills.
Look closely at the orange starfish.
Follow the crab-track to the dark basin.
Finish the sketch and slip out.
Go toward the squeaking and flutter.
Creep on under the hanging shapes.
Move quietly toward the grey light.
Back away and leave the bats be.
Climb on past the old carving.
Push up through the mossy funnel.
Step in for a quick look.
Leave the cache and beat the tide.
